context: (a)  systemic mineral imbalance ("metastatic") √  granular, sandlike psammomatous calcifications ›  infection √  mottled calcifications simulating residual barium √  sheetlike calcifications surrounding bowel and mesentery √  annular / plaquelike calcifications
